plugins.name: djungle-agent-os
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.2.1: Librarian — briefing weekly automatico con alert su drift/contraddizioni/duplicazioni (skill /librarian, /librarian-now, /briefing). v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board dashboard, agent versioning. Self-service portal su agents.djungle.io.
